70010000100646.description:
- D&D-inspired visual novel with 8 unique characters. 
- Immersive reading experience of at least 6 hours on your first play-through. 
- Branching narrative with 3 unique endings.
- Casual drink mixing and quest building with a dash of challenge – a refinement of the original game’s mechanics.
- LGBTQ+ positive representation. 
- Content warning: mentions of death, grief, and violence.
- A new standalone game in the Tavern Talk universe!

Once Upon A Time...
...you find yourself in a little, bleary portside town in the south-east of Phesoa. There, 36 years before the events of Tavern Talk, you dive into the role of the Tavernkeep, the owner of The Drowsy Dragon, a small quayside bar on the coast of Borkam. 

You have a special ability, gifted by one of the Great Dragon Gods or acquired through wizardly hubris: Mixing magic drinks that can alter the fate of your guests—be it mean mercenaries, savvy sailors or ambitious adventurers. Every guest, no matter who they are, has a place in your warm tavern by the seaside. 

In The Drowsy Dragon, fate is not written in the stars, it is written in the menu! Mix unique drinks from a wide ensemble of magical potions—but be aware: There is more than one solution! 

As you listen to stories brimming with the spirit of adventure, you sit within the cozy walls of your tavern and pick up rumors to turn them into quests. Some of them are old sailor’s yarn, so sort them thoroughly before sticking them up the wall! 

As you meet new and familiar faces, all seems well. Your establishment is flourishing and friendships are made. All until something starts brewing on the horizon, something that’s going to twist your brightest dreams into your darkest nightmares. 

Content Warning
Like in every good Pen & Paper campaign, Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker touches topics that may hit right in the feels. Please be aware that there will be mentions of death, grief and violence.
70010000100646.intro: In this D&D-inspired visual novel you will run a cozy seaside tavern, meet adventurers, gather rumours and mix fate-altering drinks to stop dreams from twisting into nightmares.
70010000100646.name: Tavern Talk Stories: Dreamwalker

70010000110059.description:
Poetic Trio is a themed set of three games. A game about rain (Pluviophile), a game about snow (Chionophile), and a game about wind (Loverowind). All in one. The core aspect of each game is the atmosphere. It is recommended for those who mostly seek to experience the mood.


Pluviophile is a short experience about the mood of rain in the woods. It is a slow-paced pure walking simulator; you only walk, slowly, in the wilderness away from civilization. A beautiful poem from Julius Cawein accompanies your short journey; and the original music score that is composed by Pınar Karabaş.

*

Chionophile is a short experience about the mood of winter in the woods. It is a slow-paced pure walking simulator; you only walk, slowly, in the wilderness away from civilization. A beautiful poem from Archibald Lampman accompanies your short journey; and the original music score that is composed by Pınar Karabaş.

The game has 2 chapters. While the first one is a little linear, the second one (which is more expansive) takes place in a large open area. There are paths for the player to follow to reduce confusion about where to go. But you are free to roam away from the path and discover.

*

Loverowind is a short experience about the wind of spring. Similar to Pluviophile, you collect flowers, and use them on the altars to reveal a poem. But this time you move much faster, unless the circles of light roaming in the world don't catch you.
70010000110059.intro: A game about rain, a game about snow, and a game about wind. All in one.
70010000110059.name: Poetic Trio

70010000117971.description:
The battlefield is set — how you fight decides everything.

Engage in fast-paced encounters where you face enemy forces in score-based missions that reward skill and efficiency. 

Every elimination brings you closer to victory, but every mistake gives your opponents the advantage. Staying focused and reacting quickly is the key to controlling the battlefield.

Navigate through a variety of combat zones designed to challenge your positioning and movement. Each environment offers different layouts and tactical opportunities, pushing you to adapt your strategy and approach every encounter differently.

Choose from a wide range of weapons and adjust your playstyle depending on the situation. Whether you prefer aggressive engagements or a more controlled approach, your decisions in combat define your success.

Every mission is built around action, timing, and control — pushing you to improve with every match and dominate every encounter.

Key Features:
-Fast-paced combat focused on skill and reaction
-Score-based gameplay that rewards performance
-Multiple combat environments with different layouts
-Weapon variety for flexible playstyles
-Tactical gameplay based on positioning and timing

Stay sharp, react fast, and take control of every encounter.
In Call of Warfront, victory depends on how you fight.
70010000117971.name: Call of Warfront

70010000120572.description:
This is a classic tale of rescuing maidens from dangerous villains such as goblins, trolls, werewolves, harpies, and other dark creatures. You will encounter them across a variety of locations throughout the game world.

Your choices directly influence the story and the progression of the main character. Certain paladin abilities depend on your moral path and personal discipline. Multiple endings await, shaped by the decisions you make along the way.

Game features:

- Meaningful moral choices that affect both survival and story progression

- High-stakes decisions where every choice matters

- A familiar fantasy storyline with a humorous twist

- Play as an unconventional paladin hero

- Player decisions influence character development and the final outcome

- Rescue maidens and become their hero

- Japanese voice-over

- Dynamic battles and engaging QTE-based activities

- Optional caravan raids

- Beautifully animated scenes
70010000120572.intro: An interactive adventure about a paladin torn between duty and desire.
70010000120572.name: Damsels in Distress

70010000126685.description:
The world of Traumatarium returns!

Decades after the great evil was finally sealed away, a new mysterious group has been sowing chaos in the shadows. And now, in their most brazen move yet, they have taken over the castle, vying for control of the land.
In response, the Order has sent one of their bravest and deadliest warriors to quell the uprising and bring swift penance to the impure.

Traumatarium is a dungeon crawler for the classic handheld console. Large maps build the world before you, as enemies try to stop you in your tracks. But hunger may get to you before they do if you're not careful, make sure to keep your health up!

A nostalgic experience that can also be played in vertical mode with touch controls to better match the '90s feeling! Play with classic green color mode or choose among multiple color palettes!
70010000126685.intro: The Traumatarium saga continues in a dungeon crawler where sprawling maps, merciless foes, and starvation itself test your every move!
70010000126685.name: Traumatarium: Penitent

70010000116473.description:
Find the hidden kitties around the apartment! Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments is an isometric hidden object game themed around cats and colorful little rooms. Explore unique, adorably decorated cube-shaped bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, bathrooms and more as you search for dozens of cleverly obscured felines lying around each stage.

By finding all the cats in an apartment, you’ll clear the stage and unlock the next. Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments is calm, casual and therapeutic with a soothing soundtrack to match, making it the perfect “anytime” experience!

• Find the cats hidden in colorful isometric apartments!
• Unlock new rooms of gradually increasing complexity.
• Rotate the apartment rooms to change your viewpoint and avoid obstructions!
• Click on cleverly placed felines to reduce the cat counter to zero.
70010000116473.intro: Solve feline-themed hidden object challenges in cute cube-shaped isometric apartments!
70010000116473.name: Secret Paws - Cozy Apartments

70010000122315.description:
Story:
1981, Somewhere in Europe.

Eighteen-year-old Noah is haunted by the memory of his mother abandoning him as a child.
He lives with his father Leonard, a failed writer obsessed with collecting items related to “Dictator X.” 
Noah wishes he would stop, but Leonard refuses to give up his strange obsession, even as they struggle financially.

One day, an auction invitation arrives, addressed to Leonard. Ignoring Noah’s protests, Leonard sets off for the old castle where the auction is to be held, promising to tell Noah everything once he returns.
But Leonard never comes home. With no way to contact him, Noah heads to the castle himself, determined to bring him home—only to witness something shocking.
Trapped inside the castle with the other guests, Noah decided to accept the Auctioneer's invitation, and take part in the auction himself.


Characters:
Noah Crawford (VA. Kengo Kawanishi)
Leonard Crawford (VA. Rikiya Koyama)
Edgar Schultz (VA. Daisuke Namikawa)
Christoph Treheim von Berg (VA. Nobunaga Shimazaki)
Otto Klein (VA. Shunsuke Takeuchi)
Karla Becker (VA. Maaya Uchida)
Lorraine Klopp (VA. Yui Ishikawa)
Hell (VA. Akira Ishida)
Auctioneer (VA. Show Hayami)

Game features:
- Explore freely within an old castle rendered in 3D
- Use reasoning and deduction to solve clues via the Word Cloud System
- Use memories to expose the truth via each Auction

In the exploration phase, you will search rooms and floors, and talk to other participants, revealing trauma and lies that will lead you to the truth each one keeps hidden.

Information you learn here will be stored in your Word Cloud, and can then be used to solve mysteries during each auction!

But in this place, the auction exhibits aren't bid on with money, but with memories.
Auction participants try to win their bids by offering their own memories, using a memory reconstruction device known as EPO.
But memories burdened by secrets or trauma can change completely, becoming distorted and incorrect.
If the participants offer incomplete memories, their auction bids will fail.

Noah must become their supporter, fixing each target's memory to ensure they are correct.
If the auction is a success, the truth will be revealed—unleashing the dramatic story behind each ill-fated auction exhibit.

Story / Script: Rika Suzuki 
Character Design: KOHSKE
Music: Yuko Komiyama, Tsukasa Masuko
Director / Producer: Shinsuke Umeda 

* This game is a story about young people learning about the past, and striving to protect a peaceful future. Although memories related to past wars feature in this game, it does not in any way, seek to glorify or promote the crimes of war.
70010000122315.intro:
The Auction of Dark Memories Begins Now.
What truths await beyond a bid made with your life?
70010000122315.name: Dark Auction - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

70050000072679.description: This is an upgrade pack that allows you to upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ software “Dark Auction” to “Dark Auction Nintendo Switch 2 Edition.”
70050000072679.intro:
The Auction of Dark Memories Begins Now.
What truths await beyond a bid made with your life?
70050000072679.name: Dark Auction - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition upgrade pack

70010000096065.description:
Pre-order now and unlock two unique in-game dice skins inspired by iconic Star Wars characters: Jawa and Clone Trooper.

Assemble your team, build your roster of iconic Star Wars™ characters, and battle with your friends and family for control of the galaxy as you move across storied planets and locations.
Choose from a wide array of Star Wars heroes and villains, each with their own unique abilities. Whether you're teaming up with Luke Skywalker or unleashing Darth Vader, every match is packed with team strategy, surprises, and classic Star Wars moments. No two battles unfold the same way, the fate of your team is yours to shape!

STAR WARS MEETS MONOPOLY®
Step into the Star Wars galaxy with a bold new twist on MONOPOLY. Experience iconic cinematic moments while competing with family and friends across iconic locations from every era of the saga.

PLAY AS A TEAM, WIN AS A TEAM
Team up with your friends and family through online play or couch co-op and experience MONOPOLY like never before with 2v2 and 3v3 competitive game modes. With endless team compositions, the game transforms classic competition into a fun strategic showdown.

ASSEMBLE YOUR ICONIC STAR WARS TEAM
Each character brings distinct hero abilities, allowing you to shape your team’s composition and lead your team to victory. Command legends like Darth Maul and Princess Leia, each with game-changing skills that turn the tide in your favor.

COMMAND THE DICE, CONTROL THE BOARD
The game can change with every roll as properties change hands in an instant. Dynamic GO events unleash game-altering twists and shift momentum rapidly, making each turn critical and victory uncertain until the final turn.

A NEW ADVENTURE EVERY MATCH
With action-packed matches, evolving team strategies, and tons of unlockable cosmetics, no two games are exactly the same. Experiment with different heroes to assemble the perfect team. There's always a reason to jump back in for one more round.
70010000096065.name: Monopoly: Star Wars™ Heroes vs. Villains

70010000097761.description:
Under the fluttering cherry blossoms on the streets of Japan, your cross-cultural romance adventure begins now! The game authentically recreates famous Japanese landmarks, where four distinctively charming Japanese girls await to meet you. Amid sweet dates, a life-or-death chase suddenly erupts on Tokyo’s late-night streets, and you accidentally stumble upon the underworld’s dark dealings of power and lust – beneath the romantic surface, a surging undercurrent of life-and-death choices lies hidden. Scenes you never dared to imagine come at you one after another! Tear through the crisis with courage, lock onto true feelings with perfect chemistry.

Deadly Charm・Japanese Heroine Gallery
An energetic anime-style cosplayer, a cool goddess who practices kendo and rides a motorcycle, a millionaire female CEO, a Japanese idol with no control over her own fate… Loli girls, graceful onee-sama, pure first loves — sweet, spicy, or dark, fierce, dashing, or gentle! All the most iconic personality types from Japanese anime and dramas are gathered here. Each is a full-fledged Japanese heroine with powerful presence. At least one of them will make your heart race uncontrollably.

Desperate Run・Tokyo Survival Files
A Tokyo adventure! In a second, you’re pulled into a real J-drama world. The story twists and turns, making your emotions surge out of control. Unpredictable plot developments, challenges full of surprise and fun — skill battles, chases, kidnappings, one wrong step and you lose your life. Go head-to-head with classic J-drama villains. All the excitement from a first-person perspective. Did you really think you were just here for a date?

Real-shot Impact・Immersive Japan Pilgrimage
Over 20 real-life shots of popular Japanese photo spots — real sunlight, real nightscapes come right at you. Akihabara, Kamakura, Tokyo Tower, Yokohama Cosmoclock… famous locations from numerous anime and manga, plus spectacular Japanese festivals and cultural scenes you’ve never seen before! Without leaving home, you can feel the streets of Japan across the ocean, immerse yourself, experience firsthand just how wonderful Japanese life can be, and witness the mind-blowing collision that breaks through the dimensional wall.
70010000097761.intro:
Cherry blossoms fall, hearts race wild.
Fall in love – or fight for your life.
Real Japan, real danger, real romance.
70010000097761.name: Blossom Voyage

70010000099758.description:
Zumba – Jurassic Marble Quest blasts you back to the age of dinosaurs! Play as an adventurous baby dino equipped with a marble-firing snout. Select your stage, aim down a winding stone path, and launch colorful marbles to create chains of three or more before they tumble off the cliff. Trigger spectacular combos, clear each wave swiftly, and claim up to three stars by keeping the marbles at bay.
Between levels, call upon prehistoric power-ups: Explosive Marbles to blow away clusters, Time Freeze to halt advancing marbles, Repaint to change your next marble’s hue, Slow Motion to decelerate the line, Destruction Shots to remove a single stray marble, and Time Revert to undo a misfire for a second chance.
Every ten levels, you stomp into a new Jurassic realm—lush Fern Forest Valleys, sizzling Volcanic Badlands, misty Swamp Marshes, and glittering Crystal Caves—each introducing fresh marble colors, winding paths, moving obstacles, and ever-increasing speeds.
Addictive and family-friendly, Zumba – Jurassic Marble Quest combines classic marble-shooter thrills with adorable dinos and prehistoric charm.
70010000099758.intro: Roar, match, and blast through prehistoric marble mayhem!
70010000099758.name: Zumba - Jurassic Marble Quest

70010000100251.description:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track brings chaotic local and online multiplayer track-building action to the next level – band together with friends to collaborate and build your track across new procedurally generated worlds - WHILST the train is running! So think fast, with more freedom than ever before, and conquer new obstacles in your way - before your trains becomes… a trainwreck! 

CHOOSE YOUR TRACK 
Now featuring a story spread across new environments, on branching paths for you to choose, so no two runs will feel the same. In these biomes you’ll now be able encounter new points of interests, side quests, daunting bosses and as well as other random encounters, so adapt quickly on your feet! New unlockable cosmetics also let you add your personal touch to your characters’ story. 

YOUR JOURNEY GETS BETTER AND BETTER 
Every excursion your crew undertakes feels increasingly meaningful, with new rewards and permanent upgrades granting you character with gameplay-modifying abilities, as well as new train engines, wagons and extensions to unlock, giving you the tools to build a multitude of train configurations to play and experiment with. Each locomotive loss is an opportunity to rebuild and get… back on track! 

CREATE, SHARE AND PLAY WITH THE COMMUNITY 
The all-new Terrain Conductor mode allows you unleash your imagination to create your very own custom maps and share these with the Unrailed community – with highlights being featured by the developers. Or if creating isn’t your thing, browse the limitless creations other players have built, so the frantic fun never ends! 

CO-OPERATE TO COMPETE 
Fulfill your burning competitive urge – manically duke it out in against another team in the new 8-player Vs Mode. Test your team’s prowess in online leaderboards with action replays and see who can achieve the highest scores.
70010000100251.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000100251.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track

70010000105159.description:
KILL ALL ENEMIES

Arashi Gaiden is a turn-based action game with fast-paced dash and slash combat. Use the dash mechanic to quickly traverse levels and slice your enemies in half in style, combining your blade with shurikens, teleports and chains that paralyze your opponents.

BREAK THE TURN STRUCTURE

Overcome levels with mechanics that change how you play and face Bosses that redefine what a turn-based game is by using special abilities in real time.

Stop the time of your enemies, play shurikens, teleport and change the direction of your dash!
Use special skills to master the field of combat, make combos and win creatively.

Survive 7 bosses that also break the turn structure, using bombs, traps, flying cuts, flames and more! Play carefully or frantically, the choice is yours.

- Over 5 hours of fun in turn-based combat, with diverse challenges and multiple solutions.
- A new level for an innovative combat system, Dash and Slash: enjoy turn-based combat with fast moves.
- Experience a stylish turn-based action game with puzzle features (or vice versa).

WIN WITH STYLE

- Get Power-Ups as you progress through the game, but manage them well during the match.
- Achieve the perfect score in each room.
- Replay each Stage with new powers after unlocking it.
- Enjoy guts and blood flying everywhere in pixel art while cutting your enemies in beautiful stages featuring settings from different locations in Japan.
- Discover Arashi's story, his involvement with Lobo and deepen the Lore of the Bravery Universe.
70010000105159.intro: Arashi Gaiden is a turn-based action game with fast dash-and-slash combat. Use blades, shurikens, teleports, and chains to defeat enemies and powerful bosses with unique mechanics.
70010000105159.name: Arashi Gaiden

70010000105359.description:
Take the role of an unhinged lady chemist in raucous side-scrolling platformer Love Chemistry - Sibella’s Formula! Shoot syringes of your special mind-control formula at weird enemies, from robots and carnivorous plants to roving bookworms, and make your way through tricky corridors in old-school pixel art style!

Avoid thorny spike traps, climb ladders to reach higher platforms, dodge projectiles and manipulate foes into falling for your flirty charms. Find and collect health items to keep this wild adventure on track as you battle through laboratories, cityscapes and more, zipping between stages on your high-tech hover bike!

• Run, jump and climb through laboratories and city streets.
• Battle roving robots, bookworms, monsters and more.
• Shoot syringes of your “love potion” to manipulate enemies.
• Avoid treacherous traps and collect useful items to survive.
• Enjoy retro pixel art with colorful HD presentation.
70010000105359.intro: Make your enemies fall for you in a side-scrolling platforming adventure about weird science!
70010000105359.name: Love Chemistry - Sibella's Formula

70010000109497.description:
Mori Carta is a handless deckbuilding roguelike. Choose left or right on every card to adventure through stories. Simple decisions lead to rich and rewarding gameplay. Four dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets, more than 1000 playable cards, over 185 unique enemies.

Features:
Deceptively simple controls: Almost every interaction in the game is handled by moving left or right.

Engaging story: Adventure with a colorful cast of characters that accompany you on your adventures.

Rich depth of builds and combos: Choosing cards to add to your deck will be critical in surviving your adventures. With over 1000 cards, the combinations are endless.

4 dramatically different characters with their own unique card sets.
1000+ playable cards.
185 unique enemies.
70010000109497.intro: Decide fast. Build smart. Survive longer.
70010000109497.name: Mori Carta

70010000112444.description:
Help Xi navigate a five-day time loop and figure out what happened to her memories in a vast hand-drawn world.
 
Together with her companion, Ouro, travel through a true metroidvania world where time changes the terrain in subtle ways. Escape the loop through exploration and battle. Change Xi’s fate and learn the truth of the Dragon Loop!
 
• Turn Bosses into Summonable Spirits
 
Defeat a wide range of interesting bosses to get exclusive summonable spirits. Destroy your foes with powerful Explosive Spirits, or summon Persistent Spirit companions to follow you around. Upgrade and evolve both types to enhance their combat power!
 
• Multipurpose Metroidvania Powers
 
Find rare Pearls to summon powerful tools that help you traverse the world. Spiky pufferfish, magnetic boxes, a vacuuming whale spirit… and more. Each has multiple uses in both combat and traversing the world, unlocking many ways to play!
 
• Fast-Paced Exciting Battles
 
Combine Xi’s strength with Ouro’s agility in fast-paced combat. Play well, manage your X-Rating, and boost your speed and combat power even further in this fast-paced combat system with no contact damage.
 
• Branches in Time
 
In Dragon Loop, time is a limited resource. Use your five days wisely and plan your routes through an easily-navigable Time Map. Explore and open up new worldlines to see how things play out differently.But don’t worry: this isn’t a roguelike; you never start from scratch.
70010000112444.intro: Escape The Time Loop In This Open-World Metroidvania
70010000112444.name: Dragon Loop

70010000119082.description:
Solitaire Legends – Sakura Dreams combines timeless Solitaire gameplay with a peaceful anime presentation filled with soft colors and elegant designs.
Play classic Klondike Solitaire in 1-card or 3-card draw mode, focusing on clean moves, smart decisions, and a satisfying flow. Each completed game rewards you with score and experience, based on how efficiently you play.
As you gain experience, you level up and unlock cosmetic rewards. These include beautiful anime-style card skins, serene backgrounds inspired by cherry blossoms and temples, and stylish card backs. Every single card has multiple skins and can be customized individually.
Before each match, you can freely adjust your deck and table to match your mood. Whether you prefer soft pastel tones, detailed anime illustrations, or a more minimal look, every game feels personal and relaxing.
With no time pressure and a steady sense of progression, Sakura Dreams offers hours of soothing gameplay and a constantly growing collection of beautiful cards.
70010000119082.intro: Play classic Solitaire in a calm, anime-inspired world. Choose between 1-card or 3-card draw, earn score and experience, and unlock beautiful card skins, card backs, and backgrounds.
70010000119082.name: Solitaire Legends – Sakura Dreams

70010000119739.description:
Urban Jungle is a charming and relaxing simulation game that invites you to transform ordinary apartments into a lush, green haven by placing delightful plants with savvy. But no worries, you won’t have to deal with watering or pest control – the plants just need a good spot, and that's enough to create to comfiest and coziest home of them all. Oh, and don’t forget to pet your cat!

Features:

- Decorate with Plants: The core gameplay revolves around arranging a diverse selection of plants in your apartment. Each plant can be placed in different spots, challenging you to find the optimal placement to enhance the room’s coziness and aesthetics.
- Puzzle Elements: While the game is primarily about decoration, it includes puzzle-like aspects. You’ll need to think strategically about where to place each plant to maximize the comfort and visual appeal of your home, ultimately unlocking new plants.
- Relaxing Atmosphere: Urban Jungle is designed to be a stress-free experience. There are no time limits or high-pressure scenarios. You can move plants around freely and adjust your setup at your own pace.
- Environmental Storytelling: The game’s narrative is subtly woven into the environment. As you progress, you’ll uncover pieces of a heartwarming story that unfolds across the different stages of the protagonist's life.
- Interactive Elements: In addition to plants, you can interact with other items like lamps and humidifiers to alter the ambiance of your apartment, further enhancing the cozy feeling.

Immerse yourself in the serene joy of plant decoration, where every decision brings your apartment closer to becoming a perfect green sanctuary.
70010000119739.intro: Use luscious plants to turn your home into a green haven in Urban Jungle.
70010000119739.name: Urban Jungle

70010000119805.description:
"You close the door of your refrigerator and an interesting life begins inside. Fruits and vegetables try to escape from this big white cage. Break everything around you and smash through shelves to find a way out. The more precise the timing of the jump, the more powerful the impact. That's exactly what you need to succeed! 

Try to get out all the fruits and vegetables out of the fridge. Carrot, cucumber, sausage, and even a spoon for some reason.

Check out the new fun game from the NOSTRA.GAMES team. 

Let the Big Fridge Riot begin! "
70010000119805.intro: Bouncing fruits and vegetables in your fridge - what could be more unusual?
70010000119805.name: Flippy Jump

70010000120830.description:
Design the space of your dreams in a world filled with cozy emotions. In <Lovely Deco House>, gather materials from nature, such as plants and rocks, to create unique furniture and props, offering creative joy. Just like dyeing old cloth with cherry blossoms to make pretty pink fabric, your ideas will soon become wonderful interiors.

Decorate the homes of your cute doll friends with carefully crafted furniture. From charming rabbit cafes to emotionally rich chick camping sites, new stories bloom wherever your touch reaches. But simple decoration isn't everything. Explore regions with their own mysterious characteristics and bravely overcome the obstacles you encounter. The rare materials you discover after hard work will make your space even more special. Start your heartwarming deco journey right now!
70010000120830.intro: Create your own healing space through collecting and crafting, a deco adventure with cute friends!
70010000120830.name: Lovely Deco House

70010000122434.description:
Heaven has turned against her. 

Waves of divine soldiers, mythological beasts, and rogue gods close in from every direction and they never stop coming. 

You are Aphrodite, the most powerful and most hunted goddess in the Greek world, walking alone through ancient lands as the sky itself attacks you.

Pick up weapons. Evolve them. Destroy everything.

Every run is different. Weapons combine and transform into devastating divine tools. Arrows of desire become storms of golden light. 

Shields of beauty become walls of destruction. The longer you survive, the stronger you become, until the screen fills with hundreds of enemies and your arsenal fills with chaos.

This is not a game you play once. This is a game you cannot stop playing.


Features:

● AUTO-ATTACK SURVIVAL GAMEPLAY: Focus on moving and positioning. Your weapons fire automatically. Your job is to survive long enough to become unstoppable.

● EVOLVE YOUR WEAPONS: Combine weapons and items to trigger powerful evolutions. Find the right synergies and watch your build go from mortal to divine.

● ENDLESS WAVES OF DIVINE ENEMIES: Gods, titans, mythological creatures, and heavenly armies. They keep coming. You keep fighting.

● GREEK MYTHOLOGY SETTING: Ancient landscapes, golden temples, divine ruins. Battle across the world of the gods as the one they could never defeat.


One more run. Just one more. That is what they all say.
Aphrodite does not die here.
70010000122434.intro:
Thousands of gods want her dead. She just wants to evolve her weapons.
Play as Aphrodite and survive the divine wrath of Olympus!
70010000122434.name: Aphrodite Evolve Weapons Survivor: Greek Gods Versus Heaven

70010000122651.description:
Let's go fishing on the Nintendo Switch™!
Travel to different world locations like North America, Europe, Africa, and the Amazon!
Each spot is home to lots of unique fish to discover!
Play solo, or compete with up to 4 players using one Joy-Con™ each!
Become the world's greatest angler!

[Score Attack]
Catch as many fish as you can within the time limit!
Look out for big fish to boost your score!

[Endless]
Sit back, relax, and enjoy endless fishing!
Watch the scenery shift from day to night!
Change your gear when the situation calls and search for big catches!

[Ranking]
Compete against players around the world in Score Attack and Endless modes!
Show off your skills by increasing your high score and rank!

[Battle]
Compete with up to 4 players for the highest score!
Face off against CPUs in single-player mode!

[Shop]
Spend the points you've earned from fishing to buy new lures and rods!
Discover the perfect combination for your fishing style!

[Records]
Every fish you catch will be added to your personal encyclopedia!
70010000122651.intro:
Embark on a fishing adventure around the world!
Cast your line and reel in fish from across the globe!
70010000122651.name: Reel it! World Fishing

70010000122762.description:
Dive into an irresistible chase in Honey Sprint, where a hungry bear must escape a furious swarm while collecting as much honey as possible along the way. With simple controls and nonstop action, each run blends quick reflexes, smart decisions, and pure fun.

Dodge obstacles, slide under branches, and jump at the right moment to keep your flow while chasing ever-higher scores. The tracks change with every attempt, always bringing fresh challenges and that addictive “just one more run” feeling.

Colorful, dynamic, and full of personality, Honey Sprint is perfect for quick sessions and lighthearted moments, delivering an engaging experience that balances challenge and pure entertainment.
70010000122762.intro: Run, Jump, and Devour All the Honey
70010000122762.name: Honey Sprint

70010000123200.description:
Welcome aboard the Determination Bringer!
 
You have been appointed senior conductor of the legendary train, which all the citizens of our vast country are happy to see in their cities. Your responsibilities are maintaining order in the carriage assigned to you and providing assistance to passengers along the way. Your tools are reporting, intimidation, searches and ejection. Remember: the conductor is always right.

Monitor the passengers
Carefully monitor everyone who enters the carriage and decide what to do with fare-evaders. Observe and report all suspicious, unauthorized and basically any passenger activity. Search the baggage and call the police if you find prohibited items.

Move up the train
Get access to the dining car or VIP compartments and carriages where high-ranking officials and big industrialists ride. Keep an eye on your colleagues and report their accepting bribes or transporting banned goods. The Ministry will not let your dedication go unnoticed.

Complete secret missions
Earn the trust of higher-ups in order to receive special assignments. Their level of secrecy will depend on your loyalty, and completion will be rewarded with a bonus or even a promotion. You will also encounter smugglers — transporting their packages along the route is risky, but profitable.
 
Visit various stations and remote corners of the country. Make difficult decisions determining the fate of passengers and your colleagues. What kind of person will you be at the end of the journey? The choice is yours!
70010000123200.name: Beholder: Conductor

70010000123840.description:
She has thousands of followers, a ring light, and a smile that breaks the internet.

Getting her attention is already hard. 
Getting a date? Even harder. 
Making her fall for you? That's the real challenge.

Each one with her own channel, her own vibe, her own reason to be impossible to forget. Work your way up, get on their radar, and earn your way into their world.

Because behind the camera, they're just girls who want someone real.

The question is whether that someone is you.


Features:

● DATE YOUTUBERS: Each girl is a star in her own right. Beauty, gaming, lifestyle, drama. Get close enough and find out who she really is when the camera's off.

● MAKE HER NOTICE YOU: She has thousands of fans. You have one shot. Go on dates around the city, say the right things, and become the one she actually thinks about.

● KEEP THE CHAT ALIVE: Text her between dates. Don't go cold. Girls who get a lot of attention drop fast the guys who don't keep up.

● UNLOCK EXCLUSIVE IMAGES: The closer she lets you in, the more she shares. Things her followers will never see.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Not every story ends the same. How far you get depends entirely on you.

A girl with millions of eyes on her. 
Completely out of reach. 
Or is she?

Prove you're worth her time.
70010000123840.intro:
Millions watch her. 
Do you think you can make her look at you?
70010000123840.name: Youtuber Girls: Love Behind the Camera

70010000124682.description:
Originally released in 1987, this action RPG casts you as the mysterious soldier mentioned above, embarking on an epic journey across six different planets.

The game features side-scrolling action RPG mechanics where each planet is divided into two parts: aerial stages that play like a side-scrolling shooter, and underground stages where you fight using martial arts-style maneuvers. Powerful bosses guard key locations, such as the entrances to the underground and the end of each stage. You’ll need to discover their weaknesses to overcome these high-stakes battles.

Please note that the difficulty level is quite high. During aerial combat, your health will deplete if you run out of fuel, and losing all health results in a Game Over. Planning your route around refueling stations is essential. In areas where refueling is impossible, managing your fuel—such as selecting low-output verniers—is a critical technique for survival. Some planets have no shops at all, so don't forget to stock up on items before you deploy.

With its dynamic combat that changes between land and sky, strategic boss encounters, and a distinct atmosphere, this title stands out as a unique sci-fi action RPG. It is a challenging experience, but one that fans of the genre should definitely take on.
 
 *This application does not have a scene select mode.
 *The main game and gallery screen (*Gallery) are in Japanese version.
 *Other menu screens and "How to play" screens are in English.
 *Flashing lights or patterns may cause dizziness, spasms, or loss of consciousness. If you feel unwell, stop playing immediately and see a doctor.
   If you have a history of these symptoms, consult a physician before use.
70010000124682.intro: A unique title featuring aerial shooting and underground combat. High difficulty—intense battles await you!
70010000124682.name: EGGCONSOLE MIRAI MSX2

70010000124731.description:
Collect pieces of the big‑eater girls and complete the puzzle!
There are 15 stages in total.
As you clear each stage, the difficulty increases!
Stages 1–10: 30 pieces
Stages 11–15: 50 pieces
The final stage is a tough one with no background watermark!
Take your time and examine each piece to complete the puzzle!
Once completed, high‑resolution images will be added to your gallery ♪
=====================
We support game streamers!
No permission is required to stream this game.
70010000124731.intro: Love to eat! A puzzle game featuring big‑eating girls is here!
70010000124731.name: Mega Eater Girls

70010000125516.description:
Put on your gloves and enter the crime scene. In this investigation sim, you will have to solve 9 unique cases full of plot twists.

From dark alleys to quiet suburban streets, every location hides secrets. Use advanced forensic tools and evidence reconstruction to piece together what really happened. There are no shootouts, no action clichés, only logic, observation, and investigation. Here, you don’t hunt criminals with guns… you catch them with science

Features:

- 9 forensic cases with complete narratives and multiple twists.
- Advanced investigation tools: drones, ground robots, and chemical analysis.
- Mature, dark stories including crimes of passion, kidnappings, and conspiracies.
- Every clue can change the entire case.
- Stress-free pacing with no timers. Investigate, analyze, and solve at your own rhythm.
70010000125516.intro: Not all visitors come in peace.
70010000125516.name: FORENSIC - M.E. Protocol

70010000126342.description:
These old scenes look normal — but one thing is from the wrong century.

Sunglasses in a Dinosaur-Era forest.
A drone above a medieval castle courtyard.
A wireless keyboard in a 1920s café.

Each vintage, sepia-toned illustration hides a single modern object that hadn't been invented yet in that era.
The modern item is drawn in the same sepia tone as the rest, so you can't spot it by color alone — you have to recognize its shape.

This is a simple observation quiz where you tap the modern item that shouldn't exist in that era.
Dinosaur times, Stone Age, Ancient Egypt, Greece, Rome, Vikings, Medieval Europe, Renaissance, Age of Sail, Baroque, Victorian, Wild West, 1920s, 1950s-70s —
17 eras, 100 questions of anachronisms hidden in time.

How to play is simple.
・Look carefully at the sepia scene
・Tap the modern item that doesn't belong

"Wait, is that a smartphone?" "No way, drones didn't exist in medieval times!"
The thrill of catching objects that slipped through time is addictive.

Hints gently suggest the category and use of the modern item, so you won't get stuck.
History and the present collide in this adult brain-training puzzle.

So — don't let that anachronism slip past you.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000126342.intro:
Something in this era doesn't belong.
Trust your common sense and spot it.
70010000126342.name: Spot the Impossible with Common Sense!

70010000126656.description:
Test your knowledge of ninja lore in simple multiple-choice quizzes!

From ninja tools and stealth techniques to training, missions, and history, each question lets you explore the fascinating world of ninja.

The rules are easy:
Read the question, choose one of three answers, and aim for the correct choice!

Perfect for quick brain training, casual play, or quiz battles with family and friends.
Keep answering questions and see if you have what it takes to become an elite ninja!
70010000126656.intro:
Train your ninja knowledge and rise to elite rank!
A quick 3-choice quiz challenge!
70010000126656.name: Road to Jonin ! The 3-Choice Ninja Quiz

70010000126710.description:
Unrailed 2: Back on Track brings chaotic local and online multiplayer track-building action to the next level – band together with friends to collaborate and build your track across new procedurally generated worlds - WHILST the train is running! So think fast, with more freedom than ever before, and conquer new obstacles in your way - before your trains becomes… a trainwreck! 

CHOOSE YOUR TRACK 
Now featuring a story spread across new environments, on branching paths for you to choose, so no two runs will feel the same. In these biomes you’ll now be able encounter new points of interests, side quests, daunting bosses and as well as other random encounters, so adapt quickly on your feet! New unlockable cosmetics also let you add your personal touch to your characters’ story. 

YOUR JOURNEY GETS BETTER AND BETTER 
Every excursion your crew undertakes feels increasingly meaningful, with new rewards and permanent upgrades granting you character with gameplay-modifying abilities, as well as new train engines, wagons and extensions to unlock, giving you the tools to build a multitude of train configurations to play and experiment with. Each locomotive loss is an opportunity to rebuild and get… back on track! 

CREATE, SHARE AND PLAY WITH THE COMMUNITY 
The all-new Terrain Conductor mode allows you unleash your imagination to create your very own custom maps and share these with the Unrailed community – with highlights being featured by the developers. Or if creating isn’t your thing, browse the limitless creations other players have built, so the frantic fun never ends! 

CO-OPERATE TO COMPETE 
Fulfill your burning competitive urge – manically duke it out in against another team in the new 8-player Vs Mode. Test your team’s prowess in online leaderboards with action replays and see who can achieve the highest scores.
70010000126710.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70010000126710.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000127278.description:
A peaceful picnic turns into a big adventure when Judy wakes up to find her house key gone!

Run, jump, slip, and explore through colorful forests, golden cities, metallic sewers, and secret filled areas in this charming retro platforming adventure.

Features:
• Over 140 levels in 8 colorful areas!
• 4 challenges for skilled players
• Many charming NPCs
• Hidden Game Girls to find
• Unlockable art, music, and more
70010000127278.intro: Judy’s house key has been stolen by a mysterious hand, and now she needs your help to get it back!
70010000127278.name: Judy's Adventure DX

70050000071077.description:
Prepare for a journey to a galaxy far, far away! Whether you’re bartering in the desert sands or marching in formation, these pre-order bonuses will make your next game night feel like you’ve scavenged treasure in the Outer Rim.

Pre-Order Bonus
Don’t miss out! Lock in your pre-order now to expand your collection with two legendary dice skins inspired by two of the galaxy’s iconic characters:

Jawa: Roll with the resourcefulness of a Tatooine scavenger. Perfect for finding luck in the most unlikely places!

Stormtrooper: Bring order to the board with the iconic Galactic Empire soldier. Don’t worry – these dice won’t miss their target!
70050000071077.name: Roll in Style: Pre-Order Bonus Dice Skins

70050000073475.description: This is an Upgrade Pack, if you already own Unrailed 2: Back on Track for Nintendo Switch™, you can upgrade to the Nintendo Switch 2 Edition using this product.
70050000073475.intro: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos than ever!
70050000073475.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000074338.description:
In Brother's Wedding Story, the newest chapter of Urban Jungle, step into the shoes of Nurgun as he prepares for one of the most important moments of his life: proposing to his boyfriend Rachata, Pharita’s brother.

Surrounded by vibrant greenery and the warmth of the Thai sun, you’ll help Nurgun design and decorate their new home, making every detail perfect for the big day. But even the most beautiful homes can’t hide uncertainty — will Rachata say yes after all?

This romantic chapter blends heartfelt storytelling with Urban Jungle’s signature charm of design, creativity, and cozy expression.
70050000074338.intro: A love story blossoms in the heart of Bangkok.
70050000074338.name: Urban Jungle: Brother's Wedding Story

70070000036632.description:
Step into the paws of a mischievous stray cat and experience a world where every moment is an opportunity for fun, chaos, and discovery. Explore lively urban backyards, complete playful tasks, interact with other cats, and turn ordinary surroundings into your personal playground.

This bundle includes main title and Skyfall Paradise DLC which not only lets you live the carefree life of a curious feline but also transforms how your adventure feels. With a brand-new skybox included, the world above you comes alive in fresh and atmospheric tones — from bright and cheerful to calm and magical — adding a whole new layer of immersion to every jump, dig, and stroll.
70070000036632.intro: Turn every yard into your playground.
70070000036632.name: Bodycam Stray Kitty Gold Edition

70070000036781.description:
Embark on a heartwarming journey with adorable kitties in Little Paws: Kitty Cat Simulator, a relaxing adventure filled with exploration, discovery, and playful charm. Travel across the world, from lively city streets to peaceful beaches and snowy mountaintops, collecting fish, uncovering secrets, and enjoying delightful interactions along the way.

This bundle includes main title and Cute Friend DLC  which adds an extra touch of cuteness to your adventure. Give your kitty a fresh and adorable new look, making every moment even more charming as you explore, play, and relax in cozy environments around the globe.

Discover new places, express your style, and enjoy the ultimate cozy cat experience.
70070000036781.intro: A cozy adventure full of charm and wonder!
70070000036781.name: Little Paws: Kitty Cat GOLD EDITION

70010000119627.description:
Astrid wakes up in Purgatory and she doesn't remember anything. 

Point and click your way through adventure-based gameplay mixed with visual novel storytelling. Solve the mystery of our heroine's unexplained and unusual death. 

Experience a heartfelt story where your choices matter, with five different interactive routes. Feel your way through a charming, funny, dramatic and moving narrative full of compelling characters, brought to life by partial voice acting.


Features:
* Visual novel narrative with choices
* Point and click adventure gameplay
* Beautiful, unique art style
* Unlock 70+ hidden items
* Partial voice acting
* Original soundtrack composed by Endigo
70010000119627.intro: Solve the mystery of Astrid’s untimely demise in this visual novel.
70010000119627.name: Pitstop in Purgatory

70010000121583.description:
Transform empty rooms into warm, cozy spaces in Cozy Home Unpacking - a relaxing organization and decoration simulator where every box hides a new story. Unpack furniture, place decorations, organize everyday items, and slowly turn simple apartments into beautiful homes filled with comfort and personality.

Take your time as you decorate bedrooms, kitchens, living rooms, and tiny cozy corners exactly the way you want. Arrange books, plants, posters, kitchenware, toys, and dozens of charming objects while enjoying a calm atmosphere and satisfying gameplay.

With soft visuals, relaxing vibes, and stress-free gameplay, Cozy Home Unpacking is the perfect experience for players who love decorating, organizing, and creating peaceful spaces.
70010000121583.intro: Make Every Room Feel Like Home.
70010000121583.name: Cozy Home Unpacking

70010000123155.description:
The ancient evil has awakened, and the fate of the world hangs by a thread.
Even Beholgar, the legendary warrior, knows that this enemy cannot be defeated by ordinary steel.

There is only one weapon capable of slaying the darkness… but the blacksmith who forged it died centuries ago.

To reclaim this cursed blade, Beholgar must descend into the depths of Hell itself, facing demonic horrors, ancient dragons, jinns, and corrupted creatures born from nightmare.

Return once again to the brutal world of Beholgar in a dark Metroidvania adventure that blends medieval fantasy with the mysticism of the Arabian Nights.

Explore forgotten kingdoms, uncover hidden secrets, forge your own combat style, and fight against the inevitable doom threatening all existence.

Features
•Brutal retro-inspired Metroidvania gameplay
•A dark fantasy world inspired by the tales of 1001 Nights
•Multiple interconnected areas filled with secrets and deadly enemies
•Fight dragons, jinns, demons, and possessed warriors
•5 unique weapons with completely different playstyles
•Secondary ranged weapons for strategic combat
•Equip powerful rings that enhance your abilities and inflict devastating effects
•Epic original soundtrack
70010000123155.intro: Return once again to the brutal world of Beholgar in a dark Metroidvania adventure that blends medieval fantasy with the mysticism of the Arabian Nights.
70010000123155.name: Beholgar 2

70010000123214.description:
Explore a quiet and cozy office from the perspective of a curious little cat in Little Kitty Meow, a relaxing adventure focused on atmosphere, exploration, and peaceful wandering.

Walk through office rooms, meeting areas, corridors, and workspaces while discovering hidden corners, cozy spots, and small environmental details that bring the workplace to life. Enjoy calm exploration, soft visuals, and a comforting atmosphere as you freely roam through the office at your own pace.

With relaxing gameplay and charming environments, Little Kitty Meow offers a simple and wholesome experience perfect for players who enjoy cozy exploration games.
70010000123214.name: Little Kitty Meow

70010000123673.description:
BECOME ONE WITH YOUR UMBRELLA!
A fast-paced Aerial Roguelite Hack and Slash where Insane Combos and pure aggression are all that stand between you and death. Step into the paws of a Raincoat Cat and face an infernal journey with nothing but your Umbrella as a Weapon!

EVOLVE OR TURN TO ASHES
Dive into merciless stages Packed with Enemies and Insane Upgrades. The deeper you go into Hell, the more aggressive you must be. Evolve your umbrella, destroy everything in your path, and forge your own combat style

MAIN FEATURES
5 Unique Umbrellas to massacre enemies in different ways

Over 60 Devastating Upgrades to transform your playstyle

Smash hordes of demonic eyes with aerial combos

Collect Pupils to unlock 12 Types of Permanent Upgrades

Use Blood Drops to intensify your playstyle and become even deadlier

DO YOU HAVE THE STOMACH FOR THIS?
Survive endless swarms of demonic eyes, push your skills to the limit, crush your own records, and conquer the top of the Global Leaderboard

Are you ready to carve your path through the underworld and reclaim your soul?
70010000123673.intro: Put on your raincoat and destroy hordes of demons in Hell. Use 5 insane umbrellas in an aerial roguelite hack and slash of pure chaos!
70010000123673.name: Hellbrella

70010000126050.description:
Endless job search. Hunt for the best resume. Die in someone else's dream. Frame HR for murders. And fail in the backrooms.

Re:re:ghosted is a first-person psychological horror game.
70010000126050.name: Re:Re:Ghosted

70010000126768.description:
Far from home and full of determination, a tiny frog sets off on the adventure of a lifetime. Explore a vibrant, storybook world brimming with secrets — from sun-dappled forests and cobblestone town squares to the towering halls of a grand castle, patrolled by a not-so-friendly giant guard.

Hop, leap, and bounce your way through charming levels as you hunt down three legendary Power Gems, the only things that can carry you back where you belong. Collect hundreds of scattered coins, outwit quirky enemies, and uncover every corner of a lovingly crafted kingdom.

And when the adventure gets a little too adventurous? Hit pause and treat yourself — and your frog — to a well-earned dance break.
70010000126768.intro: A long way from the pond — but home is worth the leap.
70010000126768.name: Frogborne

70050000075203.description:
ARVEN, THE WOLF BLADE

Play as Arven, a Ranger of relentless determination who heard of a group of heroes trapped within an Astral Prison. Fighting alongside the wolf Kat, his hunting companion, this new hero had no other choice but to lend his blade to those fighting for their survival.

Arven is a character from Fallen Fates, the upcoming action RPG by Hibernian Workshop.

DLC CONTENT
- Brand new mechanic - Arven never travels without Kat. Traverse the astral prisons in good company with this wolf who will follow you throughout your escape attempts. Compatible with the Celestial Heaven DLC: your pet and Kat will follow you side by side.
- 25 new unique spells - Use the greatsword to create powerful slashes, move nimbly while setting up explosive traps, and more.
- Signature Spell - Throw a hook onto an enemy and dash towards them, while summoning Kat to assist you in battle and follow you around the battlefield.
- 30 Associated Perks - Adapt Arven's Signature Spell to your playstyle.
- 2 Weapon types for different playstyles:
    - Alpha Sword - Medium-range attacks, swinging and slashing enemies.
    - Ethereal Missiles - Use magic to shoot powerful blasts of energy from long range.
- 6 Weapon Passives - Each weapon comes with 3 unique passives, making Arven and Kat an even deadlier duo.
- Stellar Voice Acting - Arven is fully voiced in Japanese and English by the incredibly talented Tagui Omi and Ben Starr, respectively.
- New Papa Yalee Stories - 4 new stories to learn about Arven and Kat's mysterious origins.
- Cinematics and ending screens - Brand new cinematics and a new ending screen have been added for Arven.

HOW TO ACCESS ARVEN
If you own this DLC and have not yet met Arven in the Garden, he will appear after a couple of escape attempts.

ADDITIONS TO THE BASE GAME
Even if you do not own the DLC, you will still be able to:

- See Arven hanging out in the Garden.
- Collect and use 2 Arven Echoes during runs.
- Fight Arven's Shadow Clone.
70050000075203.name: Arven - The Wolf Blade

70070000036634.description:
Get ready to fuel up for the ultimate off-road thrill with Buggy Off-Road Racing! Dive into this exhilarating journey as you navigate through the wild landscapes of the USA, Europe, and Asia. It's all about high-octane races where your bravery and skills are in the spotlight.

Dive into 12 off-road tracks
Take on 3 worldwide racing challenges
Unlock and upgrade 4 powerful buggies
Experience dynamic racing modes

Gear up to skid, drift, and accelerate over breathtaking turns and leaps. Are you up for making your mark and racing towards triumph? 

Jump into the driver's seat in Buggy Off-Road Racing and turn the whole world into your racing arena.

This bundle includes base game, Custom Cruisers, Custom Cruisers #2, Custom Cruisers #3 and Custom Cruisers #5 with:

-4 new skins for each Buggy
70070000036634.intro: The Ultimate Dirt Track Challenge on your Nintendo Switch™!
70070000036634.name: Buggy Off-Road Racing Supreme Edition

70070000036683.description:
Club Sports Collection – Your All-In-One Lounge Experience!

Step into the ultimate game lounge — right on your Nintendo Switch
Club Sports Collection brings together the world’s favorite bar and club games in one stylish, realistic experience.

Challenge yourself or your friends in thrilling matches of pool, snooker, darts, bowling, and foosball — all recreated with authentic physics, intuitive controls, and stunning 3D visuals. Whether you’re sinking the 8-ball, striking for a perfect 300, hitting the bullseye, or scoring the winning goal, every game feels true-to-life and packed with fun!

Customize tables, cues, darts, balls, and more to create your perfect setup. Play solo to master your precision, or invite friends for exciting local multiplayer duels.

Features:

* Five classic club games: Pool, Snooker, Darts, Bowling & Foosball
* Realistic physics and immersive 3D graphics
* Single-player and local multiplayer modes
* Dozens of customization options for cues, balls, boards, and tables
* Smooth Joy-Con™ controls for a natural gameplay feel

Grab your Joy-Con, step up to the table, and prove your skills —
Club Sports Collection turns your Nintendo Switch into the ultimate social playground!

This bundle includes base game, Darts Fever Stylish Precision #1, Darts Fever Stylish Precision #2 and Darts Fever Stylish Precision #4 with:

- 15 brand-new dart designs
70070000036683.intro: Five club classics. One game. Endless fun on Nintendo Switch™!
70070000036683.name: Club Sports Collection Legendary Edition

70070000036687.description:
Cue Up the Fun – Pool & Snooker Fever: 2 in 1 Bundle!

Get ready to master the table in Pool & Snooker Fever: 2 in 1 Bundle — the ultimate cue-sports experience on your Nintendo Switch!

Enjoy both the fast-paced excitement of pool and the strategic precision of snooker, all in one complete and immersive game.

With intuitive controls, smooth physics, and stunning 3D visuals, Pool & Snooker Fever: 2 in 1 Bundle perfectly recreates the atmosphere of real pool and snooker halls — anytime, anywhere.

Whether you’re practicing perfect shots or enjoying friendly matches with friends, this game guarantees realistic gameplay, smooth controls, and endless entertainment.

Features:

* Two complete cue-sports games in one pack
* Realistic 3D graphics and physics
* Local multiplayer for head-to-head fun
* Multiple tables, cues, and cue balls to unlock and customize
* Smooth, accessible gameplay for beginners and pros alike

Chalk your cue, line up your shot, and rule the table!

The Pool & Snooker Fever: 2 in 1 Bundle is your all-in-one ticket to cue-sports perfection on Nintendo Switch.

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #1, Expansion Pack #2 and Expansion Pack #4 with:
10 new queues
10 new pool table designs
15 new snooker table designs
70070000036687.intro: Two Classics, One Cue – Master Pool & Snooker on Nintendo Switch™!
70070000036687.name: Pool & Snooker Fever: 2 in 1 Bundle Legendary Edition

70070000037005.description:
Travel the world and sharpen your detective skills with the ultimate Spy Guy vacation bundle! Explore the vibrant streets of Rome, discover the sunny coasts of Croatia, uncover secrets among the ancient wonders of Greece, and dive into the colorful atmosphere of Indonesia.

This special collection includes:

Spy Guy Roma
Spy Guy Croatia
Spy Guy Greece
Spy Guy Indonesia
Spy Guy Seaside

Each adventure is packed with hidden objects, charming locations, and exciting mysteries to solve. Become an even greater detective as you travel across breathtaking holiday destinations and help Spy Guy crack every case!
70070000037005.name: Spy Guy Vacation Bundle

70010000121134.description:
Create, decorate, and transform beautiful outdoor spaces in Garden Designer Simulator — a relaxing gardening and landscaping experience where creativity and hard work go hand in hand. 

Start your journey in a quiet small town with your very own house and garden. Learn the basics of outdoor maintenance by mowing lawns, trimming hedges, removing weeds, watering plants, and restoring old fences. Grow flowers and vegetables in your greenhouse while turning your backyard into a cozy and welcoming retreat. 

As your reputation grows, local residents will begin asking for your help. Travel across town to restore neglected gardens, redesign outdoor spaces, and complete landscaping projects. Earn rewards, unlock new tools and decorations, and continue improving your own property. 

After completing the first missions, unlock a more open experience where you can focus on gardening, landscaping, decoration, or customer requests. With repeatable contracts and randomized tasks, there is always a new garden waiting to be transformed. 

Key Features:  
• Mow lawns, trim hedges, and clean overgrown yards  
• Plant flowers and grow vegetables in your greenhouse  
• Paint fences, water plants, and restore outdoor spaces  
• Decorate gardens with statues and decorative items  
• Complete gardening jobs for residents around town  
• Buy new seeds, tools, and outdoor decorations  
• Upgrade and customize your own home garden 

Garden Designer Simulator is perfect for players who enjoy cozy simulation games, relaxing outdoor activities, and creative garden customization.
70010000121134.intro: Turn forgotten gardens into cozy little paradises where every flower matters
70010000121134.name: Garden Designer Simulator

70050000045574.description: Clue - Neon Noir includes a Location, 6 Suspects, 4 Customisation Items, and 6 Tokens to unlock!
70050000045574.name: Clue - Neon Noir

70010000110896.description:
Experience the Ultimate Competitive Multiplayer Racing Game!

Welcome to Car Guys, an exciting multiplayer racing game where skill 
and strategy come together in fast-paced, action-packed competitions. 
Represent your nation and climb the global leaderboard in adrenaline-fueled 
races that will put your reflexes and driving skills to the test!

Features:

- Real-Time Multiplayer
- Race against players from around the world in thrilling, high-speed 
  competitions.
- Enjoy a seamless and lag-free online experience.

- Compete for Your Nation
- Choose your country and contribute to its position on the global 
  leaderboard.
- Prove which nation dominates the track and rise to the top.

- Action-Packed Racing
- Pick up power-ups like missiles and shields to outmaneuver your rivals.
- Master both offensive and defensive driving strategies to claim victory.

- Vibrant Visuals
- Experience colorful graphics and dynamic environments that bring 
  each track to life.
- Smooth gameplay that keeps the action fluid from start to finish.

- Extensive Customization
- Personalize your vehicles with unique skins, decals, and upgrades.
- Choose from sleek sports cars to rugged off-road machines—the 
  possibilities are endless!

- Competitive Events
- Participate in daily and weekly championships with unique challenges 
  and rotating game modes.
- Test your skills and earn exclusive rewards.

- Progression & Meta-Game
- Unlock new tracks, vehicles, and upgrades as you progress.
- Use in-game currency earned from races to enhance your car's performance.
70010000110896.intro: Experience the thrill of Car Guys, a high-octane multiplayer racing game! Represent your nation, compete in explosive races, and climb the global leaderboard.
70010000110896.name: Car Guys

70010000121057.description:
Build your own automotive empire in Auto Shop Simulator — the ultimate business simulation where every deal counts. Step into the role of a car dealership owner and transform a small local garage into a thriving vehicle marketplace. Buy used and premium cars, negotiate profitable deals, manage your inventory, and satisfy customers looking for their perfect ride.

Start with a modest showroom and gradually expand your business by unlocking new vehicles, upgrading facilities, and attracting more buyers. From economy cars to luxury models, every purchase and sale influences your reputation and success. Manage finances carefully, react to changing market trends, and make strategic decisions to grow your dealership into the top auto shop in town.

Features:
	•	Buy and Sell Vehicles: Discover valuable cars, negotiate prices, and sell vehicles for maximum profit.
	•	Realistic Dealership Management: Organize inventory, monitor market value, and keep your showroom stocked with popular models.
	•	Expand Your Business: Upgrade your dealership, unlock larger spaces, and improve customer experience.
	•	Dynamic Customer System: Meet different customer needs and handle daily business challenges.
	•	Immersive Simulation Experience: Enjoy detailed vehicles, dealership customization, and rewarding progression.

Auto Shop Simulator delivers an engaging experience for car lovers and simulation fans alike. Test your entrepreneurial skills, make smart business decisions, and grow your small dealership into a successful automotive empire.
70010000121057.intro: Ready to become the ultimate car tycoon?
70010000121057.name: Auto Shop Simulator

70010000121204.description:
Feeling lucky? Step into the Grand Vegas Casino and try your hand at 4 of the most popular gambling games in the world, with no need to get dressed up or risk your wallet! Grand Vegas Casino is a casual gambling simulation game for players of all skill levels, offering intuitive controls and a fluidly animated HD-2D graphic style to keep you immersed in luxurious high-rolling action.

Build your strategy, improve your skills, place daring bets and experiment to win. Featured casino games include Poker, Roulette, Blackjack and Slots, each with unique mechanics and standard rules that have made them timeless staples of the gambling scene. Play against computer-controlled opponents and unlock cool rewards as you progress! Are you ready to go all in?

• Play Poker, Blackjack, Roulette and Slots using standard casino rules!
• Experiment, strategize and easily restart if you run out of money.
• Collect rewards for defeating AI opponents!
• Enjoy crisp and colorful HD presentation in fluidly animated 2D style.
70010000121204.intro: Become a gambling master without the financial risk as you test your skills in the world's most popular casino games!
70010000121204.name: Grand Vegas Casino

70010000060617.description: Outsmart and outgun your opponent in R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos, the ultimate turn-based sci-fi strategy collection! This two-game combination of the classic R-Type Tactics titles arrives on modern consoles for the first time, equipped with an armada of unique units to deploy across dozens of levels. Multiple campaigns allow you to take on the Bydo Empire or even play as them yourself. Their fates are up to you!
70010000060617.intro: The fate of two races depends on you.
70010000060617.name: R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos

70010000100975.description:
#DRIVE Rally is an arcade-inspired rally racing game set in the golden racing era of the 1990s. Grab your co-driver and burn rubber in iconic, race-winning cars across varied rally stages and terrains in some of the most recognizable rallying locations in the world—perfect for fans of retro racing games and newcomers alike.

From the sunny landscapes of Dry Crumbs, through the whispering woods of Holzberg, to the chilly wilderness of Revontuli; take a journey through a diverse world you haven’t experienced in racing games before. Each destination delivers distinctive stage design and visual flair that celebrate classic ’90s rally vibes.

Jump behind the wheel of legendary rally cars, including Das Holzwagen, The Doggo, The Bobond, and many more. Build and customize your cars from the ground up to match your driving style and rally your way. Personalize the body, paintwork, and decals, then add that cherry on top with custom decorations - create a ride that feels truly your own.

Don’t forget the co-driver! Your co-driver can be your biggest cheerleader and toughest judge. It’s a partnership that thrives on performance and emotion. Their goal is to assist your runs with helpful navigation and tips to improve your stage times - making every run feel dynamic and replayable.

Features
• The spirit of ’90s rally for players of all ages and generations

• Exciting driving mechanics, simple to start but demanding in depth

• Stunning rally tracks and locations inspired by the world

• Retro-inspired cars with awesome personalization and car customization options

• Compete on online leaderboards to be the best and prove your rally skills
70010000100975.intro: Put your foot down and redefine speed in #DRIVE Rally!
70010000100975.name: #DRIVE Rally

70010000104583.description:
From the hidden pages of Jurnal Risa comes a visual novel where the boundary between the living and the unseen begins to blur. Step into Jurnal Risa's world where each shadow holds a story, and every whisper leads you deeper into the unknown.

Witness the resurrection of the foretold nemesis of the Jurnal Risa crew, which was never revealed before. Unveil its dark destiny within this horror-adventure game.

This is the tale of Jurnal Risa, as recounted to me by Risa herself.

Key features

• A Paranormal Adventure Mystery

Jurnal Risa is known for exploring haunted places and sharing true ghost stories from Indonesia. Their adventures, bonds, and spiritual encounters inspire the game’s mystery and emotional depth.

• Brought to Life with Full Voice Acting

Fully voiced by the real members of the group, each scene feels authentic as it captures their unique personalities, real-life bonds, and the emotional weight behind every supernatural encounter.

• Mini games

Take a break from the tension with fun mini-games.

• Collect the Fragments of the Past

Gather collectible photos as you complete stories and challenges. Each photo unlocks a memory or reveals a hidden piece of the mystery.


Ready to turn the last page and face what lingers beyond?
70010000104583.intro: Witness the resurrection of the foretold nemesis of the Jurnal Risa family, which was never revealed before. Unveil its dark destiny within this horror-adventure game.
70010000104583.name: Jurnal Risa: Dark Destiny

70010000106637.description:
With brilliant visuals by Shio-Koji and a story composed by Akeo, the yuri visual novel "UsoNatsu -The Summer Romance Bloomed From A Lie-" is coming to Nintendo Switch™!
2D animation gives the girls a perky liveliness as their engrossing romance is brought to you fully voiced!

2D animations create a more immersive story!
Details such as hand gestures and flowing hair are expressed in the 2D animations, granting the characters more realism and depth of emotion.

Includes the full version of the opening theme!
The full version of the opening theme, "sun shade", is included.
It becomes accessible from the MUSIC option in the main menu after finishing the story.

Playable in three languages!
The text can be set to English, Simplified Chinese, or Japanese (audio is in Japanese only).
This includes in-game text, options, and the digital manual. Language settings can be changed at any time."

Enjoy full HD visuals!
Experience the game in high-definition 1920x1080 resolution by playing in TV Mode.

Touch screen controls and Nintendo Switch Lite are also supported.

Game System
There are no choice-based story branching elements in this visual novel.
You simply watch the story unfold like turning the pages of a book or enjoying an anime or movie.

Story
One night, Tachibana Kaoru, a second-year student at Aoba Dai-ichi High School in Minatocho, confesses her love to her middle school homeroom teacher, Shimotsuki Mirei, only to have her heart broken.
To make matters worse, the moment is witnessed by Minagi Shiori, a diligent classmate of Kaoru's and a model student.
On the brink of despair, Kaoru confides in Shiori about her painful past with Mirei.
Shiori listens silently and then enigmatically posits a peculiar question:
"Instead of forgetting someone you cared about... do you think it's possible to simply overwrite those memories with different ones?"
As their relationship blossoms, Inohara Riku—another student in the same grade and secret admirer of Shiori—also becomes involved, and the three begin to weave the tale of their summer together...

Staff
Original Art: Shio-Koji
Scenario: Akeo

Cast
Tachibana Kaoru    VA: Koichi Makoto
Minagi Shiori    VA: Iwami Manaka
Inohara Riku   VA: Fujimura Konomi
Shimotsuki Mirei    VA: Matsui Eriko
Asahi Kayo    VA: Shibasaki Noriko
Tachibana Koharu   VA: Makita Tsugumi
Tachibana Atsushi   VA: Kageura Daisuke
Minagi Naomasa   VA: Watanabe Hiroshi
*Fully voiced (including the protagonist)
70010000106637.intro: In the midst of their lively school days, three high school girls and one female teacher must contend with confused emotions and harbored LIES...
70010000106637.name: UsoNatsu -The Summer Romance Bloomed From A Lie-

70010000110884.description:
Battle enemy forces reminiscent of alien weapons from retro sci-fi works in this single-player 2.5D FPS.

■STORY
One day, a gargantuan alien spaceship invades and unleashes countless combat weapons upon Earth, demolishing human civilization in the blink of an eye. Although humans succeeded in developing special weapons that could deal an effective blow to the aliens, it was too late to revive their civilization.

To this day, however, the Earth has yet to fall silent despite its abandoned cities, for swarm weapons known as "CogrinaUnits," 12-meter-tall autonomous humanoid units, collect and operate the limited number of special weapons that remain, and continue to fight against the aliens, all for the sake of accomplishing the mission humanity entrusted them with....

■Simple yet varied missions with a wide range of fighting styles
・Choose whether to take down the multi-legged robot weapons ravaging the city by leveraging the terrain, or to move in close and finish them off.

・The next unit is sent out immediately once you are defeated.

・Only a limited amount of equipment remains, so you'll need to recover items from defeated units to continue the battle.

■A story of hope told between battles
・Find out what comes of the battle against the overwhelming enemy forces

・Light-hearted conversation scenes with fellow units during intermissions

・Plus a shiba inu!
70010000110884.intro: Even after all has ended, We continue to fight to accomplish the mission humanity entrusted us with.
70010000110884.name: The Last Salvage Squad

70010000113432.description:
DUNGEON RAZE is an intense power-trip where you don't crawl through the dungeon, you blast through it. Become a destruction magic-wielding witch and reduce every wall and defense system to dust.

Demolish Everything in Sight
Not even the walls of the dungeon can stop you. Tear through the map to hunt down gold, power-ups, and rescue allies. Your firepower vaporizes the dungeon as you go

Experience Instant Hyper-Inflation
Forget grinding for gradual stat upgrades and go for explosive growth. Power scaling that defies logic is achievable within minutes. Watch your projectiles multiply, and your damage skyrocket until even the toughest walls satisfyingly crumble in a single shot.

Lead a Mobile Fortress
No one razes alone. Smash through the rubble to rescue imprisoned adventurers and add their firepower to your own. As your squad grows and your inflation peaks, the screen fills with a chaotic storm of magic and munitions that no defense can withstand.

Push Your Destructive Limits
Find out just how much devastation you can unleash:
- Eternal Dungeon: No limits, no end. See how far your "hyper-inflated" firepower can go in a procedurally generated maze of infinite destruction.
- Speed Raze: How fast can you raze the core? A time-based mode where every second counts.
- Hard Dungeon: High-difficulty stages filled with tougher walls and enemies, designed to challenge your ultimate power. Encounter special allies and powerful, unknown foes.
70010000113432.intro:
Demolish walls to grow stronger!
A high-octane, magic destruction shooter.
70010000113432.name: DUNGEON RAZE

70010000119817.description: Learn to react quickly to unconventional situations. Maneuver your way through sneaky enemies and use your attacks to destroy planetary defenses.
70010000119817.intro: Fire up your blasters and smash through any planet's defenses!
70010000119817.name: Planet Divers

70010000121245.description:
Welcome to Enterprise Corp.
We are pleased to have you.

Your job is simple. You must press the button when the system instructs you to do so.

The system will evaluate your punctuality, consistency, and ability to follow instructions.
Good performance will result in promotions within the corporate hierarchy.
Poor performance will have immediate consequences.

There is no need to understand the internal workings of the processes.
All relevant information will be provided when appropriate.

The system does not make mistakes.
The system records every action.

Thank you for your interest in becoming part of Enterprise Corp.

In “Just. Press. The Button.”, every action counts and every decision defines you. Explore a world where obedience to rules is not optional and promotions come with increasing expectations. "Just. Press. The Button." places you face to face with routine and constant corporate pressure as you attempt to maintain your position within the hierarchy.

Prepare for a dystopian experience that blends the race for success, monotony, tension, and the consequences of every step, all while the system watches, evaluates, and records your every move.
70010000121245.name: Just. Press. The Button.

70010000121290.description:
The World Cup has been stolen by aliens and it's up to you to get it back! 

Soccer Kid is an innovative 2D platformer that challenges you to navigate the world using only your soccer skills. Instead of just running and jumping, you'll need to dribble, header, and kick your way through enemies and obstacles across the globe.

This QUByte Classics edition brings the ultimate nostalgic package to your Nintendo Switch™.
70010000121290.intro: A classic platformer where your soccer ball is your weapon!
70010000121290.name: Soccer Kid Collection (QUByte Classics)

70010000121657.description:
